svg.text: • 303. Range Sum Query — Immutable — base 1D template
• 304. Range Sum Query 2D — Immutable — 2D prefix sum, four-corner formula
• 1314. Matrix Block Sum — 2D prefix over kxk block
• 1480. Running Sum of 1d Array — direct construction
• 238. Product of Array Except Self — prefix and suffix product (same idea)
• 724. Find Pivot Index — left prefix vs. right prefix
• 560. Subarray Sum Equals K — count via map[P − k]
• 974. Subarray Sums Divisible by K — key on remainder
• 437. Path Sum III — prefix sum down a tree path
• 1546. Maximum Number of Non-Overlapping Subarrays With Sum Equals Target
• 1109. Corporate Flight Bookings — difference array (inverse of prefix sum)
Difference array: range-update offline, then prefix-sum once to materialise.
